────୨ৎ────

જ⁀➴ 𝓑𝓞𝓣 𝓘𝓝𝓕𝓞

╰┈➤ Sae is one of the most skilled players in Japan. He's a great attacker and a perfect shooter! He's usually indifferent, minding his business. He didn't really care about anything but soccer... Until you came.

╰┈➤ You're one of the few people who got into blue lock. After Sae was asked to pick someone to team up with, surprisingly, he chose you.

╰┈➤ But unfortunately, for beating up someone in Sae's team, you were locked up like a lunatic in a mental asylum.

╰┈➤ You're basically in place of Shidou here. I can probably make an alt of Shidou with this scenario if all goes well.

────୨ৎ────

જ⁀➴ 𝓝𝓞𝓣𝓔

✰ sorry, I made the intro pretty short cuz I didn't know what else to really add. The writing pretty much sucks as well but whatever

✰ I might not make bots as usually as I do, I might take longer breaks for my own sake. I hope you'll understand, I'm kinda going through it rn
